# INTRN — Internships for Highschoolers

INTRN is a platform connecting high school students in South Asia with meaningful internship opportunities. The platform is free for students and focuses on learning-oriented, unpaid internships.

## Site Purpose

INTRN helps high school students discover real-world work experience by browsing and applying for internships posted by verified companies. Companies use the platform to find motivated young talent for project-based roles.

## Public Sections

- **Homepage** — https://intrn.replit.app/  
  Overview of the platform, live stats, and featured internship previews.

- **Internship Search** — https://intrn.replit.app/search  
  Browse and filter all active internship listings. Supports filtering by location, type, and skills.

- **Internship Detail** — https://intrn.replit.app/internship/:id  
  Full details for a specific internship including description, requirements, duration, and application form.

- **Blog** — https://intrn.replit.app/blog  
  Career advice articles, industry insights, and success stories aimed at high school students.

- **Blog Post** — https://intrn.replit.app/blog/:slug  
  Individual blog articles covering topics like resume writing, interview prep, and career planning.

- **For Companies** — https://intrn.replit.app/company-info  
  Information for organisations that want to host interns through the platform.

- **Help & Support** — https://intrn.replit.app/help  
  FAQs and support resources for students and companies.

## Content Notes

- All internships listed are unpaid and learning-focused.
- The platform serves high school students (ages 14–18) primarily across South Asia.
- Blog content is written for early-career students and covers internship tips, skill-building, and career exploration.
- Student and company account pages are behind authentication and are not public.
